---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

The problem you are trying to solve, or the limitation you have run into.
Focus on the need rather than a specific solution.

## Proposed solution

What you would like Slick Code to do. If you have thought about the
command, flag, or behavior, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have tried or ruled out, if any.

## Additional context

anything else that helps explain the request.
